topic.title: SAP TM Frequently Asked Viva Questions (Technical & Functional)

learningObjectives.title: Understand structured viva responses
learningObjectives.description: Answer core SAP TM questions with definition, purpose, usage context, and practical example.

learningObjectives.title: Understand interview question categories
learningObjectives.description: Differentiate functional, technical, implementation, and scenario-based question patterns.

learningObjectives.title: Understand practical interview readiness
learningObjectives.description: Apply end-to-end transportation flow explanations in project and viva discussions.

sections.title: SAP TM Frequently Asked Viva Questions (Technical & Functional)

sections.content: SAP TM viva examinations and interviews commonly assess a candidate's understanding of transportation processes, SAP objects, integration concepts and implementation experience. Interviewers typically begin with basic concepts and gradually move toward scenario-based and implementation-oriented questions.

sections.title: Key Strategy
sections.content: Answer every question in four parts: Definition → Why it is needed → Where it is used → Example.

sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
rows: Transportation planning, execution and freight settlement solution.
What business problems does SAP TM solve?
Transportation optimization, cost reduction and shipment visibility.
Demand generated from deliveries requiring transportation.
Planning object created from transportation demand.
Difference between Freight Unit and Freight Order?

items: How does SAP TM integrate with SAP S/4HANA?
How are APIs used in SAP TM?

sections.content: Question: A customer places an order. Explain the complete transportation process in SAP TM. Expected explanation: Sales Order → Outbound Delivery → Freight Unit → Transportation Planning → Carrier Selection → Freight Order → Transportation Execution → Freight Settlement → Reporting.

items: Which SAP TM module interested you most?
How would you solve a transportation delay?

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Whenever possible, explain answers using a real business example involving customers, deliveries, carriers and freight orders.

sections.title: Example Answer
sections.content: Question: Why is Carrier Selection important? Answer: Carrier Selection chooses the most suitable carrier by evaluating cost, service level, capacity and business rules. This helps reduce transportation costs while maintaining delivery commitments.

sections.title: Viva Tip
sections.content: Interviewers often ask follow-up questions. After answering, be prepared to explain how the concept fits into the complete transportation lifecycle.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Do not answer only with SAP terminology. Explain the business purpose in simple language before discussing technical details.

items: Be confident with integration and planning concepts.
